caseStudy.title: Customer 360 Integration
caseStudy.description: Unifying 8 data sources into a single customer view.
caseStudy.overview: A telecommunications provider's customer data was fragmented across billing, network, support, and marketing systems. Customer-facing teams had no unified view, resulting in poor experience during support calls and missed upsell opportunities.
caseStudy.problem: Support agents switched between 5 different systems to gather context before addressing a customer query, adding minutes to every call. Marketing campaigns were launched without awareness of active support tickets, damaging customer relationships further.
caseStudy.solution: A Customer 360 platform was built on top of the CRM, integrating data streams from all 8 source systems in real time. A unified customer timeline presented agents with the full history of billing events, support interactions, and product usage in a single interface. Marketing suppression lists were automatically updated based on open support cases.

results.summary: Support quality improved dramatically, and the unified view enabled contextually relevant upsell conversations that increased attach rates on premium products.
